Zathura (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,045,540Details
International Box Office $30,500,000
Worldwide Box Office $58,545,540
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $22,199,813
Total $22,199,813
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,427,872 (47.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.09 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$65,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,223 opening theaters/3,232 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $52,328,337

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 11th, 2005 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: February 14th, 2006 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for fantasy action and peril, and some language
Running Time: 95 minutes
Franchise: Jumanji
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Sibling Rivalry
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Radar Pictures, Teitler Film, Michael De Luca Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
